review.evidence: Tests preserve schemaVersion 1, top-level/data legacy mirrors, status/code/results, compact projection, text/exit behavior, and CLI-only reachability. They require AgentOperationResult only at data.agentResult, keep compact output legacy-only, and map only approved bounded query/adoption/recovery operations.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Tests keep CLI schemaVersion 1 and compact/text/exit semantics independent from Agent protocolVersion and nested result evolution.
Every migrated JSON route must nest a fully normalized result with CLI surface/runtime/state/build provenance and cliSchemaVersion 1.
Success/refusal/partial fixtures assert outcome.kind and resource.status independently inside data.agentResult while legacy envelope status remains unchanged.
CLI envelope schemaVersion remains 1 while Agent protocol and CLI schema provenance remain separate fields.
Normal JSON preserves legacy mirrors, compact excludes Agent fields, and real CLI fixtures retain command/fields/exit semantics; nested Agent data is additive only.
